Package algatorgraph

Class DEdge<V,​W>

  • java.lang.Object
    • algatorgraph.DEdge<V,​W>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable
    public class DEdge<V,​W>
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.io.Serializable
    Represents an edge in a graph data structure with generic identifiers for the source and target vertices. This class provides methods to get and set the edge's properties, including its source vertex, target vertex, and weight.

    The equals, hashCode, toString methods have been overridden. 

     Usage example:
 
 DEdge<Integer, Double> edge = new DEdge<>(0, 2, 5.0);
 System.out.println("Source vertex: " + edge.getSource());
 System.out.println("Target vertex: " + edge.getTarget());
 System.out.println("Weight: " + edge.getWeight());
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      DEdge​(V source, V target)
      Constructs a new edge with the specified source vertex and target vertex.
      DEdge​(V source, V target, W weight)
      Constructs a new edge with the specified source vertex, target vertex, and weight.

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      boolean equals​(java.lang.Object o)

      Returns the identifier of the target vertex of this edge.

      Returns the weight of this edge.

      Sets the target vertex identifier of this edge.

    • Constructor Detail

      • DEdge

        public DEdge​(V source,
             V target)
        Constructs a new edge with the specified source vertex and target vertex.
        Parameters:
        source - the identifier of the source vertex of the edge
        target - the identifier of the target vertex of the edge

      • DEdge

        public DEdge​(V source,
             V target,
             W weight)
        Constructs a new edge with the specified source vertex, target vertex, and weight.
        Parameters:
        source - the identifier of the source vertex of the edge
        target - the identifier of the target vertex of the edge
        weight - the weight of the edge

    • Method Detail

      • getSource

        public V getSource()
        Returns the identifier of the source vertex of this edge.
        Returns:
        the source vertex ID

      • getTarget

        public V getTarget()
        Returns the identifier of the target vertex of this edge.
        Returns:
        the target vertex ID

      • getWeight

        public W getWeight()
        Returns the weight of this edge.
        Returns:
        the weight of the edge

      • setSource

        public void setSource​(V source)
        Sets the source vertex identifier of this edge.
        Parameters:
        source - the new identifier for the source vertex

      • setTarget

        public void setTarget​(V target)
        Sets the target vertex identifier of this edge.
        Parameters:
        target - the new identifier for the target vertex

      • setWeight

        public void setWeight​(W weight)
        Sets the weight of this edge.
        Parameters:
        weight - the new weight for the edge

      • equals

        public boolean equals​(java.lang.Object o)
        Compares this edge to the specified object (DEdge) for equality. Two edges are considered equal if they connect the same source and target and have the same weight (including null weights).
        Overrides:
        equals in class java.lang.Object
        Parameters:
        o - the object to compare with this edge
        Returns:
        true if the given object represents an edge equivalent to this one, false otherwise

      • hashCode

        public int hashCode()
        Returns a hash code value for this edge. The hash code is computed based on the two vertices and weight. This ensures consistency with the equals(Object) method.
        Overrides:
        hashCode in class java.lang.Object
        Returns:
        a hash code value for this edge

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString()
        Constructs a string representing this edge
        Overrides:
        toString in class java.lang.Object
        Returns:
        the string value for this edge
